commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh 2 Chronicles 35:4 And prepare yourselves according to your fathers' houses, according to your divisions, according to the writings of David king of Israel, and according to the writings of Solomon his son. Hebrew chammanim, (Haydock) "statues of the sun. "The term often denotes those open enclosures, where sacred fire was kept in honour of the sun. (Calmet) Septuagint, "the heights above them. "Syriac, "he destroyed the altars, idols, tigers, and temples, (5) the bracelets, little bells, and all the trees which had been consecrated to idols. "Arabic, "the altars, idols, and leopards.
